user.title: AV Access IP
user.description: This creates one AV Access integration entry. After it is added, open Configure to add encoders and decoders by IP address.

abort.already_configured: AV Access IP is already set up.

add_device.title: Add a device
add_device.description: Choose the device type, enter its IP address, and give it a friendly name. The integration will connect to verify and identify it.

edit_device.title: Edit a device
edit_device.description: Choose a configured device, then update its IP address, friendly name, and decoder display-power settings. The integration reconnects to the IP address to refresh hostname, MAC address, model, and firmware.

confirm_device.title: Confirm device
confirm_device.description: Review the detected device data. The detected fields are informational; only the friendly name from the previous step is saved as the Home Assistant name.

display_profile.title: Display profile
display_profile.description: Choose a display preset for this decoder. Samsung The Frame pre-fills the tested RS232 Ex-Link settings; Generic / manual leaves the power settings editable from defaults.

power_config.title: Display power (this decoder)
power_config.description: Configure how this decoder turns its attached display on and off. CEC defaults work for many TVs; RS232 codes are display-specific. For Samsung The Frame over Ex-Link, use the pre-filled RS232 values and cross TX/RX wiring.

remove_device.title: Remove a device
remove_device.description: Remove a configured AV Access device from this integration. Home Assistant may keep old entity registry entries until you delete them from Settings > Devices & services > Entities.

rename_device.title: Rename a device
rename_device.description: Choose a configured device, then enter the friendly name Home Assistant should use.

data.enable_broadcast: Use UDP broadcast for group switching

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device. Check the IP address and that the device is powered on and reachable.
error.already_configured: A device with that IP is already added.

abort.no_devices: There are no devices to remove.

switch_group.name: Switch group to source
switch_group.description: Switch multiple decoders to a single encoder source at once.

target.name: Decoders
target.description: The decoder media_player entities to switch.

source.name: Source
source.description: The encoder to route to all selected decoders (name or MAC).

clear_source.name: Clear decoder source
clear_source.description: Unbind one or more decoders from their current source.

target.name: Decoders
target.description: The decoder media_player entities to clear.

send_cec.name: Send CEC command
send_cec.description: Send a raw CEC command string through one or more AV Access devices.

target.name: Devices
target.description: AV Access entities whose devices should send the CEC command.

cec_string.name: CEC command
cec_string.description: Raw CEC command string passed to cec -s.

reboot_device.name: Reboot device
reboot_device.description: Reboot one or more AV Access devices.

target.name: Devices
target.description: AV Access entities whose devices should reboot.

samsung_frame_art_mode.name: Samsung Frame Art Mode
samsung_frame_art_mode.description: Turn Samsung Frame Art Mode on or off through a decoder's RS232 Ex-Link connection.

target.name: Decoders
target.description: Decoder entities connected to Samsung Frame TVs.

enabled.name: Art Mode enabled
enabled.description: Turn Art Mode on when enabled, or off when disabled.
